name: Cookie Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the margarine, vanilla, and salt until well combined.
3. Gradually add the sugar replacement and mix until smooth.
4. Stir in the sifted flour and chocolate chips until incorporated.
5. Fold in the chopped walnuts until evenly distributed.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly golden brown, stirring occasionally to ensure even cooking.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks before serving.
